11B.title: Infantryman
11B.notes: Primary infantry MOS. 22-wk OSUT Fort Moore. Foundation for Ranger, SF, Delta, Sniper.

11C.title: Indirect Fire Infantryman (Mortarman)
11C.notes: 81mm mortar. Assigned during OSUT classification (~15% of 11X). May be phased to vehicle-mounted systems.

18B.title: Special Forces Weapons Sergeant
18B.notes: All infantry/crew-served/foreign weapons. SFAS + 15-wk MOS phase. Direct action specialist.

18C.title: Special Forces Engineer Sergeant
18C.notes: Demo, construction, breaching. SFAS + 15-wk MOS phase.

18D.title: Special Forces Medical Sergeant
18D.notes: LONGEST SF track. 50-wk MOS phase. PA-level training. Most respected MOS in SF. Strong civilian bridge.

18E.title: Special Forces Communications Sergeant
18E.notes: SATCOM, HF, VHF, crypto. SFAS + 15-wk MOS phase. Best civilian IT/comms bridge.

18F.title: Special Forces Intelligence Sergeant
18F.notes: Available only after holding another 18-series MOS. Intel collection and analysis.

18X.title: Special Forces Candidate (enlistment option)
18X.notes: Not a permanent MOS. Entry pathway. Guarantees SFAS attempt. If pipeline fails: Army assigns MOS by needs (could be any support MOS). HIGH RISK.

Option_40.title: Option 40 Contract Addendum (not an MOS)
Option_40.notes: Added to 11B/11C OSUT contract. Guarantees RASP 1 seat after Airborne. Only ~8% of Option 40 contracts result in Ranger Bn assignment. MUCH lower risk than 18X because floor is still 11B.

RASP_1_graduate.title: 75th Ranger Regiment Scroll holder
RASP_1_graduate.notes: Not a separate MOS. 11B/11C in the Regiment. Earn Ranger tab via Ranger School. Delta Force draws heavily from 75th.

68W.title: Combat Medic
68W.notes: Best MOS for healthcare civilian bridge. EMT-Basic certification on graduation.

35F.title: Intelligence Analyst
35F.notes: Strong bridge to federal law enforcement, CIA, NSA, defense contractors.

89D.title: EOD Technician
89D.notes: Highest civilian salary bridge of any enlisted Army MOS. DOE, FBI, private sector.

25B.title: IT Specialist
25B.notes: CompTIA cert pathway. Strong civilian IT market.

160SOAR.title: Night Stalkers (160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment)
160SOAR.notes: Open to rated and non-rated soldiers. Assessment and selection (SOAAS) required. Helicopter support for all US SOF.

PSYOP_37F.title: Psychological Operations Specialist
PSYOP_37F.notes: SOF designation. Less physically extreme selection than SF. Deployable with theater SOC.

CA_38B.title: Civil Affairs Specialist
CA_38B.notes: SOF designation. Works with civilian populations in COIN, stability ops. Strong civilian transition.
